name: Merge core
summary: Implement pairtools-compatible merge for already sorted pairs/pairsam inputs.
goal: Implement oracle-tested `pairs-rs merge` for small sorted pairs/pairsam inputs, preserving stable sorted output and compatible headers.
explicit_non_goals: Do not implement dedup, split, stats, restrict, phase, sample, scaling, filterbycov, or parse2 behavior.
Do not implement full external compression-program plumbing.
Do not change parse, sort, or select behavior.
Do not benchmark or claim speedup.
allowed_commands: pixi run pairtools merge tests/data/mock.4stats.pairs tests/data/mock.4stats.pairs
oracle_commands: pixi run pairtools merge tests/data/mock.4stats.pairs tests/data/mock.4stats.pairs
acceptance_criteria: `pairs-rs merge` matches pairtools oracle output on committed small sorted fixtures after normalizing volatile command headers.
`-o/--output` writes merged rows to a file and stdout is used when output is omitted.
Unsupported merge options fail loudly with `not implemented`.
known_risks: Pairtools merge has broad header and compression semantics; M120 starts with small sorted inputs.
